data.title: 国际服活动复刻「The Cathedral's Merry Christmas: Remedial Knights' Gift」
data.summary: [Event Preview] Sensei, 'The Cathedral's Merry Christmas: Remedial Knights' Gift' event is coming ba
data.body:
[Event Preview]

Sensei, 'The Cathedral's Merry Christmas: Remedial Knights' Gift' event is coming back soon!

If you missed it before, this is your chance to see it!
